Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), pkgconf, texinfo, libgpmg1-dev [linux-any], libncurses-dev, libx11-dev, libxext-dev, libxft-dev, libfontconfig-dev, libfreetype-dev, libcairo2-dev, libpango1.0-dev, x11proto-core-dev, zlib1g-dev, librsvg2-bin
Testsuite-Triggers: fp-compiler, g++, gcc, gdb, gfortran, imagemagick, libc6-dev, locales-all, matchbox-window-manager, perl, python3-pil, python3-pyte, python3-pytest, x11-apps, x11-xserver-utils, xdotool, xvfb
